summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Backend API and Frontend. All 38 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend CRM module loads correctly with all tabs functional. Data flows properly from API to UI. Minor UI issue: 'Invalid Date' displayed for clients without last_stay date.

ui_bugs.issue: Dernier séjour column shows 'Invalid Date' for clients without last_stay date

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication required for all CRM endpoints (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/crm/clients - List clients with pagination (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/clients with filters (client_type, status, search) (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/clients - Create client with all fields (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/clients - Duplicate email rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/crm/clients/{id} - Get client details with stays (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/clients/{id} - 404 for non-existent client
Backend: PUT /api/crm/clients/{id} - Update client and verify persistence (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/crm/clients/{id} - Soft delete client (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/segments - List segments with client counts (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/segments - Create dynamic segment (200)
Backend: PUT /api/crm/segments/{id} - Update segment (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/crm/segments/{id} - Delete segment (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/campaigns - List campaigns (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/campaigns?status=draft - Filter by status (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/campaigns - Create campaign (200)
Backend: PUT /api/crm/campaigns/{id} - Update campaign (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/campaigns/{id}/launch - Launch campaign (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/campaigns/{id}/launch - Already active rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/crm/workflows - List workflows (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/workflows - Create workflow with trigger/actions (200)
Backend: PUT /api/crm/workflows/{id} - Update workflow (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/workflows/{id}/toggle - Toggle workflow status (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/conversations - List conversations (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/conversations?channel=email - Filter by channel (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/messages - Send message to client (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/messages - Invalid client rejected (404)
Backend: GET /api/crm/auto-replies - List auto-reply rules (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/auto-replies - Create auto-reply rule (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/crm/auto-replies/{id} - Delete rule (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/alerts - List alerts (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/alerts?unread_only=true - Filter unread (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/alerts - Create alert (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/alerts/{id}/read - Mark alert as read (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics - Get CRM analytics with all KPIs (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/sync-from-pms - Sync clients from PMS (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/client-by-email/{email} - Get client by email (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/client-by-email/{email} - 404 for non-existent (404)
Frontend: CRM Dashboard loads with KPI cards (Clients, Retention, NPS, CA)
Frontend: Alerts section displays alerts from API
Frontend: Clients tab shows client list from API with pagination
Frontend: Client detail view shows client info, stays, preferences
Frontend: Segmentation tab shows segments with client counts
Frontend: Campaigns tab shows campaigns with status and actions
Frontend: Workflows tab shows workflows with triggers and toggle switches
Frontend: Analytics tab shows retention chart and channel distribution
Frontend: Inbox tab shows conversations with channel filters
Frontend: Auto-Replies tab shows rules and platform connections
Frontend: Connectors tab shows integration status
Frontend: All navigation tabs are clickable and functional
action_items: Fix 'Invalid Date' display in GuestList component when client has no last_stay date - add null check before date formatting
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: GuestList.tsx should handle null/undefined last_stay dates gracefully instead of showing 'Invalid Date'
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed clients, segments, campaigns, workflows, auto-replies, alerts during backend testing. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Backend API fully tested with 38 passing tests. All CRUD operations work for: Clients, Segments, Campaigns, Workflows, Conversations/Messages, Auto-replies, Alerts. Analytics and PMS Integration endpoints work. Frontend CRM module loads data from API correctly. All tabs functional: Clients, Segmentation, Inbox, Réponses Auto, Workflows, Campagnes, Intelligence (dropdown with 9 sub-modules), Analytics, Connecteurs, Configuration. Minor issue: 'Invalid Date' shown for clients without last_stay.

crm_analytics_api.get: GET /api/crm/analytics - returns total_clients, active_clients, new_clients_month, retention_rate, average_nps, average_ltv, top_segments, channel_distribution

frontend_crm_module.dashboard: Loads with KPI cards and alerts
frontend_crm_module.data_integration: All tabs load data from backend API
